_doc: Verbs that turn the protagonist into an object — the literal AA-CW (this session) failure 'Scarlett looks where she is kept'. Per-band, because what's wrong for an infant ('walks') is fine for a preschooler. The check looks for `<protagonist_pronoun_or_name> is <verb>` or `<protagonist> was <verb>` patterns plus the verb in any subject-position adjacent to the protagonist's name. False positives are tolerable here — the writer can revise.
